creator: dagenda@earthlink.net
text:
Upon successful installation of Lingoteach-0.3.9_7 attempts to configure
cause the application to crash. Specifically, opening "file" and then
"preferences" in the gtk-gui for Lingoteach-0.3.9_7 crash the application.

Fix: 

Unknown
How-To-Repeat: Open the Lingoteach-0.3.9_7 gtk-gui in KDE and open the drop down menu
for "file." Select "preferences" and the application crashes.
